title: Red Hat Security Advisory: kernel-rt security update
overview:
An update for kernel-rt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: kernel-rt security update

An update for kernel-rt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for kernel-rt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
kernel-rt-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.src.rpm
kernel-rt-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-core-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-core-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-debuginfo-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-devel-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-modules-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-modules-extra-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debuginfo-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debuginfo-common-x86_64-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-devel-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-modules-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-modules-extra-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-debug-kvm-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
kernel-rt-kvm-4.18.0-553.82.1.rt7.423.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

CVE-2023-53226: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

wifi: mwifiex: Fix OOB and integer underflow when rx packets

Make sure mwifiex_process_mgmt_packet,
mwifiex_process_sta_rx_packet and mwifiex_process_uap_rx_packet,
mwifiex_uap_queue_bridged_pkt and mwifiex_process_rx_packet
not out-of-bounds access the skb->data buffer.

CVE-2023-53257: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

wifi: mac80211: check S1G action frame size

Before checking the action code, check that it even
exists in the frame.

CVE-2025-39864: In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

wifi: cfg80211: fix use-after-free in cmp_bss()

Following bss_free() quirk introduced in commit 776b3580178f
("cfg80211: track hidden SSID networks properly"), adjust
cfg80211_update_known_bss() to free the last beacon frame
elements only if they're not shared via the corresponding
'hidden_beacon_bss' pointer.
